## Notes

The vendored files under `crates/noa-theme/vendor/themes/*.conf` are Ghostty-format theme files
extracted from the upstream `ghostty-themes.tgz` release asset. The extraction keeps upstream theme
names as filenames and adds the local `.conf` extension expected by noa's code-generation script.
